selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
2200
Total Hours
7
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany

Why It's Important
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces Config Items Management tool for safe packaging and migrating configurations across environments without risk.
Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling across domain boundaries.
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage latest language features, virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for tax operations.
Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.
Oracle 26ai Database
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered optimization, advanced analytics, and improved query performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Tech Debt Across Teams
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
Config Items Management
Build dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production environments without manual intervention.
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026

01

Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management

Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor

Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.

agenticCustomInput:
I expect 8 instances.
Generate only slides for each  "initiative" found under the "initiative group" called "NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE" in "Estimates.xlsx". 
"Total hours" value for the "initiative" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Total Hours" column.

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Accessibility
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
448
Total Hours
3
Epics
Other
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Inclusive User Experience
By implementing accessibility improvements according to WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549, the Solon Tax product becomes more inclusive and ensures equal access for all users, regardless of ability.
02
Regulatory Compliance
Achieves compliance with European accessibility requirements and reduces the risk of non-compliance penalties while strengthening the product's reputation in the public sector.
03
Enhanced User Satisfaction
Improves user satisfaction across all user segments by ensuring the application is fully navigable via keyboard, supports screen readers, and meets minimum color contrast ratios.
Key Epics & Features
Accessibility Improvements - ATH (Current PI28)
This enabler focuses on improving the accessibility of the Solon Tax application in alignment with recognized standards. Enhancements implemented during this PI aim to ensure that users of all abilities can effectively interact with the system, in compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines. Enabler includes effort for UI/UX Accessibility Audit activities.
Accessibility Improvements - SPA (Current PI28)
This enabler focuses on improving the accessibility of the Solon Tax application in alignment with recognized standards. Enhancements implemented during this PI aim to ensure that users of all abilities can effectively interact with the system, in compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines. Enabler includes effort for UI/UX Accessibility Audit activities.
Accessibility Improvements - DAID (Current PI28)
This enabler focuses on improving the accessibility of the Solon Tax application in alignment with recognized standards. Enhancements implemented during this PI aim to ensure that users of all abilities can effectively interact with the system, in compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines. Enabler includes effort for UI/UX Accessibility Audit activities.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
MAINTAINABILITY
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE · Solon Tax 2026
4508
Total Hours
5
Features
Other
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Technical Debt Resolution
Address technical debt and challenges identified during previous PIs to enable organic product evolution and reduce future effort implications.
02
Developer Experience
Eliminate pain points in local development setup including database migrations, component testing, and documentation to improve team productivity.
03
Configuration & Deployment
Enable safe, selective migration of configurations across environments with versioning, dependency management, and rollback capabilities.
Key Epics & Features
Improvements / Challenges - EOS
Address technical debt and resolve challenges identified during previous PIs. Gather and systematically resolve technical issues to establish defined methodologies and enable organic product evolution.
Improve Dev Experience for Local Setup
Eliminate development pain points including database migration issues, slow component tests, performance bottlenecks, and local Keycloak configuration problems. Deliver Maintenance Guide O0300.
Unicode Characters in Code Fields
Enable administrators to use Unicode characters in configuration code fields for multilingual support. Apply whitelist validation across all Solon Tax Config entity types with security normalization.
Introduce ArchUnit
Implement automated architectural testing framework to enforce design principles, prevent architectural drift, and reduce technical debt through CI/CD integration and baseline rule establishment.
Config Items Management POC
Design and prototype tool for safe, guided configuration migration across environments with dependency resolution, conflict detection, dry-run validation, and rollback capabilities.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Operability
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
59.5
Total Hours
1
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Generic API Operations
Ability to call backend APIs as operations in a generic way, enabling flexible integration patterns across self-service and resource management systems.
02
Enhanced Entity Creation
Ability to call operations that create entities other than forms, expanding the scope of self-service capabilities beyond traditional form-based workflows.
03
Proxy Service Integration
Call proxy services from Self Service to Resource Management or third parties with proper validation, enabling seamless external system integration during forms creation.
Key Epics & Features
Call Proxy Services - RM & SS Documentation
Enable Self Service to call proxy services to Resource Management or third parties with validation from RM or third parties details in SS, and vice versa for comprehensive integration.
Backend API Operations
Implement generic capability to call backend APIs as operations, supporting flexible integration patterns without token validation constraints where applicable.
Entity Creation Beyond Forms
Extend operation capabilities to create entities other than forms, enabling broader self-service functionality and improved user experience for complex workflows.
Security in Forms Operation API
Apply security controls in forms operation API to ensure safe execution of proxy service calls and protect against unauthorized access during form operations.
Token Validation Handling
Support calling services without token validation where appropriate, with detailed handling specifications for different service integration scenarios.
Implementation Documentation
Provide comprehensive documentation clarifications on how implementors can leverage proxy services, API operations, and entity creation capabilities in their solutions.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Performance Efficiency
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
935.5
Total Hours
3
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Performance Bottleneck Resolution
Addresses severe performance degradation in Reference Data Microservice affecting both UI responsiveness and BPMN process execution through intelligent caching strategies.
02
Resource Optimization
Implements green coding principles and programming guidelines to optimize resource utilization and reduce carbon footprint across the platform.
03
System Reliability
Eliminates redundant database queries for static datasets and ensures consistent high-speed responses required for revenue administration tasks.
Key Epics & Features
Reference Data - Enhanced Caching
Implement a caching layer in the Reference Data Microservice to eliminate redundant DB queries for static datasets. Cache persists unless a data changed event or manual refresh is triggered.
Performance Improvements (Current PI28)
Comprehensive performance enhancements to ensure the application operates efficiently, enabling team members to work without hassle and process actions of all users seamlessly.
Green Coding Programming Guidelines
Define and incorporate green coding principles into programming guidelines for Java, JavaScript, Rego, Drools, Helm charts, Maven, PostgreSQL, Oracle PL/SQL, Liquibase scripts, and Docker images.
Documentation & Standards
Fully document all configuration options, split strategies, and rule evaluation logic with usage examples, reference implementations, and operational guidelines for maintainability.
Non-Functional Requirements
Maintain or improve performance for large datasets, ensure security with no sensitive data exposure, preserve accessibility, and ensure usability for admin configuration and maintenance.
Maturity Index Enhancement
Increase platform maturity index through resource utilization optimization, training materials, merge request checklists, SonarQube rule adjustments, and optional carbon footprint tracing tools.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Reliability
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
2986.2
Total Hours
2
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Data Integrity Assurance
Implements optimistic locking with version control to manage simultaneous record modifications, ensuring consistent updates and preventing data corruption from concurrent access.
02
Distributed Transaction Handling
Introduces strong error handling for synchronous operations across microservices, ensuring data integrity in HTTP API invocations and Kafka message consumption scenarios.
03
Conflict Resolution Strategy
Establishes clear conflict handling and retry policies for UI, batch, and BPMN workflows, with user-friendly error messaging and automated recovery mechanisms.
Key Epics & Features
Record Locking - Apply logic to Party record
Manages simultaneous record modifications through version control mechanism. Each Party record includes a version attribute incremented automatically upon successful update. System verifies submitted version matches current database version before committing.
Concurrency Conflict Handling
Implements mismatch detection and rejection logic. On version mismatch, transaction is rejected with message: "This record was modified by another user. Please reload and review the latest data." UI users reload and retry; batch/BPMN processes execute retry policy with configurable attempts.
Data Integrity improvements - Distributed Transactions
Introduces appropriate error handling for synchronous operations involving distributed transactions across Registry and Taxpayer microservices. Covers HTTP API invocations and Kafka message consumption with strong error handling patterns.
UI Lock Management
Implements optional soft UI lock when user enters edit mode to reduce user conflicts and improve experience. Handles session timeout, browser crash, and lock release on cancellation or configurable timeout.
Batch & BPMN Retry Policy
Establishes retry policy with configurable attempt counts for batch and BPMN workflows. Includes latest version reload capability and exception logging for failed operations.
NFR Validation & Documentation
Ensures Performance, Security, Accessibility, and Usability NFRs are tested and not negatively impacted. Documents all adjustments and fulfills Definition of Done requirements.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Security
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
2152.6
Total Hours
1
Epic
Other
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Data Privacy & GDPR Compliance
Enables administrators to restrict access to sensitive personal data based on defined classifications, ensuring compliance with GDPR and other regulatory requirements.
02
Granular Access Control
Provides fine-grained permission management across UI, direct service calls, and APIs, allowing organizations to enforce data protection policies aligned with legal requirements.
03
Risk Mitigation & Trust
Reduces unauthorized data access risk through masking, encryption, and visibility controls across logs, messages, and operational reports, building greater trust with stakeholders.
Key Epics & Features
Data Security - Restrict Access to Personal Data GDPR (Part 1/4)
Core framework enabling admins to restrict access to sensitive personal data for Party, Party Roles, and Attachments with configurable masking or visibility modes across UI, APIs, and services.
Data Security - Define Access per User Access Group (Part 2/4)
Admin interface to define classification-level permissions per user access group, enabling role-based access control with granular permission sets (Read, Create, Update, Delete, Search).
Data Security - Restrict Access in Logs (Part 3/4)
Extends data protection to Security, Audit, and Access logs with masking capabilities, ensuring sensitive data is not exposed during logging, exception handling, or auditing activities.
Cross-Entity Data Protection Propagation
Ensures classification-based restrictions propagate across all system entities including Forms, Cases, Human Tasks, Taxpayer Accounts, Registration Records, Notifications, Contacts, and Notes.
Identification Labels & Message Store Protection
Applies classification restrictions to Identification Labels and Message Store with configurable masking or non-visibility modes, maintaining data privacy in all user-facing contexts.
Operational Reports & NFR Compliance
Restricts record visibility in Operational Reports based on classification levels and permissions, with comprehensive testing of Performance, Security, Accessibility, and Usability NFRs.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Traceability
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
2237.9
Total Hours
4
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Audit Trail Completeness
Enables comprehensive audit logging for codelists, registration calendars, and authorization objects, ensuring complete traceability of all system changes and compliance with GRC requirements.
02
Unified History View
Consolidates audit log entries under parent items and live records, providing a single unified view of all related changes across multiple versions and entities.
03
Enhanced Logging Capabilities
Introduces granular application logging with configurable sanitization for sensitive data masking, prepared statement logging, and service layer execution tracking for debugging purposes.
Key Epics & Features
Audit Log - Code Lists Traceability
Display all audit logs for codelists, codelist items, and attributes under live records. Enable history view for all codelist-related changes with performance, security, and accessibility compliance.
Audit Log - Registration Calendars
Provide audit logging for resource calendars including time offs, assigned calendars, calendar details, and calendar exceptions with unified UI display of related details.
Audit Log - Authorization Management
Display audit logs for authorization objects under securable objects, covering access groups, roles, users, and skills with complete related item traceability and UI integration.
Solon Tax Logging Enhancements
Implement granular application logging including prepared statement logging, row query result logging in debug mode, service layer execution aspects, and configurable log sanitization for sensitive data masking.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Usability
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
3104.9
Total Hours
9
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Enhanced User Experience
Improves UI/UX design specifics and search panel reusability across all screens, delivering a more intuitive and consistent user interface.
02
Clear Interaction Patterns
Establishes distinct View and Edit modes with clear button distinctions, reducing user confusion and unintended data changes.
03
Improved Navigation
Adds breadcrumbs bar and optimized header bar with Save button, enabling users to easily navigate and manage their work.
Key Epics & Features
UI/UX Improvements: Design specifics
Design specifics for comprehensive UI/UX enhancements across the platform.
UI/UX Improvements: Improve Table with extra messages
Enhance table messaging to cover 'No results' or 'Cannot apply search due to restrictions' scenarios for clearer user communication.
UI/UX Improvements: Search Panels - Reusable in all screens
Implement top and bottom search panels as per Figma design with new title and Add button positioning for consistent reusability.
UI/UX Improvements: FE extra functionalities - Generic
Provide alternative filter positioning on top of tables and add expand/collapse all buttons for enhanced configurability and UX.
UI/UX Improvements - Schema Changes
Schema-level changes to support enhanced UI/UX improvements across the platform.
UI/UX Improvements: Search and navigation - Header Bar Improvements
Reorganize header bar with keyboard support, language shortcuts, and profile information moved to user profile page for cleaner interface.
UI/UX Improvements: Interaction friction - View and Edit buttons distinction
Establish clear View and Edit modes with distinct button states, quick view drawer, and read-only preview functionality.
UI/UX Improvements: Search and navigation - Bars at the top of the pages
Display only relevant information in main page bar, add Save button for quick saving, and include breadcrumbs bar for navigation.
Display and search by Source and timestamp columns in Codelists, Parties and Addresses
Enable users to see and search by Source, Creation Date, and Modification Date columns across Addresses, Codelists, and Parties.
